item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: We are back on 27 July.

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic pasta Bolognese with parmesan, crispy breadcrumbs and finely chopped parsley. (1+6+10+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Pasta pomodoro with butter beans, parmesan, crispy breadcrumbs and finely chopped parsley. (1+6+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: We look forward to welcoming you back on 27 July. Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Moroccan lamb tagine with vegetables and chickpeas, served with spiced couscous tossed with fresh herbs, topped with apricots and roasted almonds. Served with cucumber and mint salad, harissa chilli sauce and preserved lemon cream. Also available gluten-free. (1+6+9+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Moroccan portobello tagine with vegetables and chickpeas, served with spiced couscous tossed with fresh herbs, topped with apricots and roasted almonds. Served with cucumber and mint salad, harissa chilli sauce and preserved lemon cream. Also available gluten-free. (1+6+9+15)
